aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic level of AEO readiness with some foundational elements in place, such as a website with relevant content and schema markup. However, there are significant gaps in local SEO, reviews, and content depth.
quick_wins: Generate and manage Google Business Profile (GBP) to improve local search visibility.
Encourage customers to leave reviews on Google to build credibility and improve local rankings.
Expand website content to include more detailed service information, location-specific pages, and FAQs.

gbp_analysis.summary: No active Google Business Profile (GBP) was found for the business. This is a critical issue as it significantly impacts local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of GBP means the business is invisible in Google Maps and local search results.
No customer reviews or ratings to build trust and credibility.
Missing opportunity to provide essential business information (hours, services, contact details) directly in search results.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are present on the website but lack consistency and citations across other platforms.
action_items: Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media, directories, and industry-specific sites.
List the business in local directories and industry-specific citation sites to improve local SEO.
Regularly audit and update NAP information to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of GBP and customer reviews severely limits local search visibility and trust-building.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Round Rock, Georgetown, and Cedar Park on Google Maps and local search results.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating and optimizing a GBP and actively managing customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Developing high-quality, location-specific content and earning backlinks from local and industry-related websites to boost domain authority.

page_title: 1431-183 A/C & Heating Repair | Round Rock, Georgetown, Cedar Park
